title: Missing tools field

title: Model mismatch: 991-line agent with sonnet

suggested_fix: Change model: sonnet to model: opus.

title: Model borderline: sonnet for complex framework

title: Missing AskUserQuestion for checkpoint confirmations
why_it_matters: Prompt discusses checkpoints but no AskUserQuestion tool for user confirmation.
suggested_fix: Add AskUserQuestion to tools if checkpoints need user input.

title: Agent context budget exceeded (51KB)
why_it_matters: 51KB prompt — too large for single agent invocation. Risks quality degradation.
suggested_fix: Consider splitting into sub-agents or chunked processing.
